substep.title: Create Plan File(s)
substep.action:
For each plan {{plan_n}} in {{plan_count}}:
Filename: - Single plan: plan-{{date}}-{{ticket_slug}}.md - Multi-plan: plan-{{date}}-{{ticket_slug}}-plan-{{plan_n}}.md
Create with frontmatter: kind: plan status: active parent: [[{{ticket_alias}}]] depends_on: [[{{design_alias}}, {{structure_alias}}]] aliases: [plan-{{date}}-{{ticket_slug}}[-plan-{{plan_n}}]] (plus standard fields)

substep.title: Compose Per-Slice Tactical Steps
Document Dependency Ordering
substep.action:
At the top of the plan doc (after frontmatter, before slice sections):
## Slice dependency order
- {{plan_n}}.1 → {{plan_n}}.2 → {{plan_n}}.3 → ... (sequential within plan) OR - {{plan_n}}.1 (parallel with {{plan_n}}.2) - {{plan_n}}.3 (depends on {{plan_n}}.1 + {{plan_n}}.2)
Within a plan, slices are usually sequential. Parallel within a plan is unusual; if it happens, the parallel slices MUST touch non-overlapping files.

substep.title: No Open Questions
substep.action:
Final check: scan the plan body for any "?", "TBD", "TODO", "FIXME" markers. If found: - Either resolve now by looping back to D or S - Or surface to user: "Plan has unresolved questions. Cannot lock. Loop back to {{relevant phase}}?"
Discipline: NO open questions in the final plan (Lock 8 + RPIV-era planner inheritance).
